notes:
After clicking play prompts with error message:

Failed to initialize player
---
Failed to initialize graphics.
Make sure you have DirectX 11 installed, have up to date
drivers for your graphics card and have not disabled
3D acceleration in display settings.
InitializeEngineGraphics failed

Tried with different proton versions (6.3.8, 7, Experimental, hotfix and gloriouseggroll) none of them worked
title: Overboard!

notes:
Had to add the command PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%
The game did not launched otherwise
title: Overboard!
